title: ERROR
text: ERROR Operation activated by the SAX parser when it issues a recoverable error. Explain this code operation ERROR params string List: in endparams Implement your code here end; ERROR operation Copy Parameters List Associated list identifying the location and nature of the error. The identifiers can be: LINE —line number within the XML document where the error occurred COLUMN —column number within the XML document where the error occurred MESSAGE —error message issued by the parser. If provided by the SAX parser, the following may also be in the list: PUBLICID —public identifier of an XML entity SYSTEMID —local identifier of an XML entity Description Use getitem /id to retrieve individual items from this list.
